task_completion.description: Verify that a new Lost Reason named 'Credit Issues' has been created in the CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the CRM Configuration or Lost Reasons list/form view showing a newly added entry for 'Credit Issues'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the customer record for 'Gemini Furniture'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo customer form view displaying 'Gemini Furniture' as the contact name.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Credit Hold' tag has been applied to the 'Gemini Furniture' customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Tags' field in the 'Gemini Furniture' customer form view containing the 'Credit Hold' tag.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the opportunity record for 'Gemini - Office Chairs'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo CRM pipeline or opportunity form view displaying 'Gemini - Office Chairs'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the opportunity is marked as Lost using the 'Credit Issues' reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the opportunity showing a 'Lost' status (often a red ribbon or indicator) and the 'Lost Reason' field explicitly displaying 'Credit Issues' in the form view or the 'Mark Lost' dialog.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Odoo UI, not a terminal executing Python or XML-RPC scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely navigated through the Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screens such as the CRM dashboard, Configuration menus, or Customer lists, rather than jumping straight to a final state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the output using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: All tags, lost reasons, and statuses must be visible within standard Odoo form fields and UI elements, not typed into a notepad or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified values to check: Customer Name is 'Gemini Furniture', Opportunity Name is 'Gemini - Office Chairs', Tag Name is 'Credit Hold', and Lost Reason Name is 'Credit Issues'. These operate on standard Odoo CRM models.
